steps.title: Spot the contextual signal
steps.content: The conference was on a narrow topic. Despite the blank about her general expertise, she still could speak authoritatively about a specific work. 'Despite' signals a concession, so the blank must describe a state of doubt or reluctance about that general expertise.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Hesitancy about her general expertise fits exactly: even though she felt unsure broadly, she could speak with authority about a specific text. 'Affinity for,' 'exceptions to,' and 'insight into' don't capture the doubt that 'despite' requires.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
